골로새서 3:1.content: If then you were raised together with Christ, seek the things that are above, where Christ is, seated on the right hand of God.

골로새서 3:2.content: Set your mind on the things that are above, not on the things that are on the earth.

골로새서 3:3.content: For you died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.

골로새서 3:4.content: When Christ, our life, is revealed, then you will also be revealed with him in glory.

골로새서 3:5.content: Put to death therefore your members which are on the earth: sexual immorality, uncleanness, depraved passion, evil desire, and covetousness, which is idolatry.

골로새서 3:6.content: For these things’ sake the wrath of God comes on the children of disobedience.

골로새서 3:7.content: You also once walked in those, when you lived in them;

골로새서 3:8.content: but now you also put them all away: anger, wrath, malice, slander, and shameful speaking out of your mouth.

골로새서 3:9.content: Don’t lie to one another, seeing that you have put off the old man with his doings,

골로새서 3:10.content: and have put on the new man, who is being renewed in knowledge after the image of his Creator,

골로새서 3:11.content: where there can’t be Greek and Jew, circumcision and uncircumcision, barbarian, Scythian, bondservant, or free person; but Christ is all, and in all.

골로새서 3:12.content: Put on therefore, as God’s chosen ones, holy and beloved, a heart of compassion, kindness, lowliness, humility, and perseverance;

골로새서 3:13.content: bearing with one another, and forgiving each other, if any man has a complaint against any; even as Christ forgave you, so you also do.

골로새서 3:14.content: Above all these things, walk in love, which is the bond of perfection.

골로새서 3:15.content: And let the peace of God rule in your hearts, to which also you were called in one body, and be thankful.

골로새서 3:16.content: Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly; in all wisdom teaching and admonishing one another with psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, singing with grace in your heart to the Lord.

골로새서 3:17.content: Whatever you do, in word or in deed, do all in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks to God the Father, through him.

골로새서 3:18.content: Wives, be in subjection to your husbands, as is fitting in the Lord.

골로새서 3:19.content: Husbands, love your wives, and don’t be bitter against them.

골로새서 3:20.content: Children, obey your parents in all things, for this pleases the Lord.

골로새서 3:21.content: Fathers, don’t provoke your children, so that they won’t be discouraged.

골로새서 3:22.content: Servants, obey in all things those who are your masters according to the flesh, not just when they are looking, as men pleasers, but in singleness of heart, fearing God.

골로새서 3:23.content: And whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord, and not for men,

골로새서 3:24.content: knowing that from the Lord you will receive the reward of the inheritance; for you serve the Lord Christ.

골로새서 3:25.content: But he who does wrong will receive again for the wrong that he has done, and there is no partiality.
